title: Require authenticated token for gameplay socket events
description: Enforce auth guard on all gameplay socket events and derive identity only from token
acceptance_criteria: Anonymous or expired token calls are rejected; gameplay identity comes from token only.

title: Add hall and terminal domain model
description: Create hall and terminal entities with configuration support for gameplay policy binding
acceptance_criteria: halls terminals and hall_game_config exist and are used by gameplay context.

title: Add KYC and age verification boundary
description: Add provider abstraction for identity and age verification before gameplay access
acceptance_criteria: Users must be age-verified and 18+ before gameplay is allowed.

title: Bind session to hall context
description: Require hall context for session and gameplay actions with reconnect-safe binding
acceptance_criteria: Gameplay start and join fail without hall binding and reconnect preserves hall context.

title: Implement loss ledger counters per player and hall
description: Track net loss by day and month per player and hall across channels
acceptance_criteria: Daily and monthly loss counters are correct across boundary conditions.

title: Enforce hard loss limits 900 day and 4400 month
description: Block stakes that exceed remaining allowance and return clear error contracts
acceptance_criteria: Any over-limit action is rejected with remaining-limit context.

title: Support player personal limits under hard cap
description: Allow stricter per-player limits with policy-compliant effective timing
acceptance_criteria: Personal limits are enforced and never exceed hard limits.

title: Implement mandatory 5 minute break after 1 hour
description: Track continuous play and enforce cooldown pause with activity summary message
acceptance_criteria: After one hour gameplay is paused for five minutes and new rounds are blocked.

title: Implement self exclusion and timed pause
description: Add self exclusion and timed pause enforcement across gameplay paths
acceptance_criteria: Timed pause cannot be cancelled early and self-exclusion cannot be lifted before one year.

title: Disable autoplay paths in production
description: Disable backend autoscheduler and Unity autospin in production profile
acceptance_criteria: Production runtime blocks autoplay behavior in backend and client.

title: Enforce minimum 30 seconds per databingo sequence
description: Prevent next databingo sequence before 30 seconds have elapsed from sequence start
acceptance_criteria: Early starts are rejected and logged.

title: Harden ticket cap validation 1 to 5
description: Keep server cap and add full coverage and config guard checks
acceptance_criteria: Requests outside 1 to 5 tickets are rejected and tested.

title: Enforce one active databingo per player
description: Block second simultaneous databingo participation including reconnect races
acceptance_criteria: Player can only be active in one databingo session at a time.

title: Block extra draw purchases in databingo
description: Remove extra draw UI and reject any extra draw attempts server-side
acceptance_criteria: No extra draw path is available and attempted calls are denied.

title: Implement prize policy engine for caps
description: Add policy engine to enforce prize caps by game type hall and link
acceptance_criteria: Databingo single prize max 2500 and extra prize max 12000 per day per link are enforced.

title: Implement simultaneous winner payout modes
description: Support split and full payout modes for simultaneous winner situations
acceptance_criteria: Simultaneous claims resolve deterministically with idempotent payouts.

title: Add immutable payout audit trail
description: Record payout events with immutable trail linked to claim and policy version
acceptance_criteria: Every payout has traceable immutable audit metadata.

title: Separate accounting ledgers by game channel
description: Separate ledger dimensions for hall main game internet main game and databingo
acceptance_criteria: Compliance reports can be produced without channel blending.

title: Build daily compliance report export
description: Generate per-hall daily turnover prize and net reports in CSV and JSON
acceptance_criteria: Daily report exports match ledger totals and pass reconciliation checks.

title: Build quarterly and half year compliance export
description: Create scheduled period reports needed for regulator submissions
acceptance_criteria: Quarterly and half-year report bundles can be generated repeatably.

title: Implement overskudd distribution engine
description: Calculate and transfer required organization share from overskudd rules
acceptance_criteria: Main game minimum 15 percent and databingo minimum 30 percent are enforced.

title: Implement RBAC for admin and operator boundaries
description: Restrict sensitive endpoints and management actions by role
acceptance_criteria: Only allowed roles can access protected operational endpoints.

title: Implement append only audit event stream
description: Add centralized immutable event stream for security and compliance events
acceptance_criteria: Critical events are queryable by player hall time and action.

title: Add monitoring and alerting for compliance faults
description: Create metrics and alert rules for limits payouts and gameplay integrity faults
acceptance_criteria: Operational alerts fire on threshold and failure conditions.

title: Run backup and restore drill
description: Document and validate restore process against target recovery objectives
acceptance_criteria: Restore drill is completed and recovery evidence is recorded.

title: Create compliance automated test suite
description: Build test coverage for limits pause exclusion timing tickets and prize caps
acceptance_criteria: Compliance suite is green in CI and blocks regressions.

title: Create pilot hall runbook
description: Define preflight rollback and support procedure for pilot hall rollout
acceptance_criteria: Pilot can be executed with clear go no-go and rollback instructions.

title: Create rollout plan 1 to 3 to 20 halls
description: Define staged rollout gates health checks and rollback rules per wave
acceptance_criteria: Rollout waves have explicit acceptance gates and rollback criteria.
